articles.title: Local obituary: Rob Halpin, 59, owned Rudy’s Cafe in Somerville’s Teele Square
articles.description:
"He had a gift to connect with all on things funny and quirky or interesting and meaningful, instinctively bridging divides since he truly never saw any."

The post Local obituary: Rob Halpin, 59, owned Rudy’s Cafe in Somerville’s Teele Square appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rob Halpin, 59, passed away, leaving a legacy in Somerville's Teele Square.
He owned Rudy's Cafe, a beloved local establishment known for its community connection.
Halpin's humor and kindness bridged divides, impacting many residents in the area.

articles.title: Local obituary: Cory Hartman, 43, N.H. dad to 3 daughters
articles.description:
"Cory lived life with energy, humor, and a deep sense of adventure."

The post Local obituary: Cory Hartman, 43, N.H. dad to 3 daughters appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cory Hartman, 43, passed away, leaving behind three daughters in New Hampshire.
He was known for his energy, humor, and adventurous spirit.
His death impacts the local community, highlighting the importance of family support.

articles.title: Amid slowdown, developers set to sell part of dormant Dorchester megaproject
articles.description:
The development team bought 2 Morrissey Blvd. in 2019 for $110 million. Now they’re putting it up for sale.

The post Amid slowdown, developers set to sell part of dormant Dorchester megaproject appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Developers are selling part of the dormant Dorchester megaproject at 2 Morrissey Blvd.
The property was purchased for $110 million in 2019, now facing a market slowdown.
This sale could affect future development and job creation in Dorchester.

articles.title: Here’s how much a substitute teacher makes in Lexington
articles.description:
A 62-year-old substitute teacher shares her salary, expenses, and how she makes it work.

The post Here’s how much a substitute teacher makes in Lexington appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 62-year-old substitute teacher in Lexington shares her financial challenges and strategies.
Substitute teachers in Lexington earn approximately $120 per day, impacting local education staffing.
Her experience highlights the need for better pay and support for educators in Boston.

Local fans anticipate playoff excitement as Bruins build momentum.

articles.title: In Back Bay’s historic Burrage Mansion, a $6.3m modern penthouse
articles.description:
It is an unusual building, wider than its neighbors, with an unmistakable chateau-esque personality.

The post In Back Bay’s historic Burrage Mansion, a $6.3m modern penthouse appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Burrage Mansion in Back Bay features a newly listed $6.3 million modern penthouse.
The building is notably wider than neighboring structures, enhancing its unique architectural appeal.
This luxury listing could influence local real estate prices and attract affluent buyers to Back Bay.
